product_overview: A mobile-first, ultra-light visual catalogue for Moroccan vendors that showcases products in a magazine-like feed and completes purchases via WhatsApp. Built on Next.js + Supabase for quick vendor onboarding, secure data, and simple WhatsApp-driven ordering.
core_goals: Provide a mobile-first, ultra-lightweight visual storefront (catalog-style) for vendors.
Enable fast vendor onboarding and management (products, stock, orders) with Supabase Auth and RLS.
Finalise purchases via WhatsApp while persisting order data in the platform.
Keep UI distinct from traditional e-shops (magazine/Instagram-like) and follow the provided design charter.
Support multi-image product listings (up to 5), soft deletes, and basic order lifecycle management.
Provide platform admin capabilities to moderate vendors and create users with roles.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Vendors authenticate using email and password via Supabase Auth to access their dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button -> Redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (incorrect password) -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Vendor Registration
features.description: Create a new vendor account with shop name, unique slug, and WhatsApp number to manage a storefront.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email and password -> Fill shop name and slug -> Fill WhatsApp number with international format -> Click Register button -> See success confirmation and redirected to /dashboard

Navigate to /register -> Fill email and password -> Fill shop name and slug -> Fill WhatsApp number with invalid format -> Click Register button -> See validation error for WhatsApp number and account not created
Navigate to /register -> Fill email and password -> Fill shop name and slug (slug already taken) -> Click Register button -> See validation error for slug uniqueness

features.name: Product Management (CRUD, Multi-image, Soft Delete)
features.description: Vendors create, edit, toggle visibility, and soft-delete products with support for up to 5 images per product.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/products -> Click Add Product -> Fill product details (Name, Price, Stock) -> Upload/Paste up to 5 image URLs -> Toggle visibility on -> Click Save Product button -> See new product listed in product list

Navigate to /dashboard/products -> Click Add Product -> Fill product details (Name left blank) -> Upload an image -> Click Save Product button -> See validation error: Name is required and product not saved
Navigate to /dashboard/products -> Find a product -> Click Delete (Soft Delete) -> Confirm deletion -> See product marked deleted and removed from public feed

features.name: Public Shop Feed & Order via WhatsApp (Vitrine Publique)
features.description: Public-facing, single-column product feed per vendor where customers open a product drawer, fill contact details, and place orders via WhatsApp while the order is stored in the DB.
user_flows: Navigate to /[slug] -> See vertical product feed with large images -> Click on a product image -> Open product drawer (Vaul) -> Fill customer details (Name, City, Phone) in the Vaul drawer -> Click 'Order via WhatsApp' -> Order saved to DB and redirected to WhatsApp chat

Navigate to /[slug] -> Click on a product image -> Open product drawer (Vaul) -> Fill customer details (Phone in wrong format) -> Click 'Order via WhatsApp' -> See validation error for Phone and no order recorded
Navigate to /[slug] -> See product that is not visible (vendor toggled off) -> Product does not appear in feed

features.name: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)
features.description: Fixed bottom tab navigation for vendors to quickly access dashboard home, product management, orders list, and settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See bottom tab bar with Home, Produits, Commandes, Paramètres -> Tap Produits tab -> Redirected to /dashboard/products -> Tap Commandes tab -> Redirected to /dashboard/orders

features.name: Order Management (Vendor)
features.description: Vendors view incoming orders captured from public feed, inspect details, and update order status (Pending -> Confirmed -> ...).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/orders -> See list of orders -> Click on an order -> See order details (customer name, phone, city, product) -> Click Confirm to set status to CONFIRMED -> See order status updated to CONFIRMED
Navigate to /dashboard/orders -> Click on an order -> Click Confirm -> Network error occurs -> See error message and order status remains PENDING

features.name: Platform Admin (Vendor Moderation & User Creation)
features.description: Admins manage all vendors, moderate shops, and manually create vendor or admin users via a creation form.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See list of vendors and moderation controls -> Click Create -> Navigate to /admin/create -> Fill form to create user (select Vendor or Admin, set is_admin) -> Click Create -> See new user in vendor list
Navigate to /admin (not an admin user) -> See access denied or redirected to /dashboard

features.name: Settings (Vendor Profile & WhatsApp Number)
features.description: Vendors update profile details including unique slug and WhatsApp contact used for orders and notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> See profile form -> Update WhatsApp number with international format -> Click Save -> See success confirmation and profile updated
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Change slug to an already used slug -> Click Save -> See validation error: slug already in use and change not applied

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password using Supabase Auth

features.name: Vendor Registration
features.description: Register as a new vendor with shop slug and WhatsApp number
user_interactions: Fill WhatsApp number with international format

features.name: Product Management
features.description: CRUD operations for vendor products with multi-image support (5 images) and soft delete

features.name: Public Order Flow
features.description: Customers view the shop, open a product drawer, and order via WhatsApp
user_interactions: Fill customer details (Name, City, Phone) in the Vaul drawer
